footer.default:
Crew Hub by Accrue
Questions? Reach out to the Operations team.

newHire.preheader: Your Crew Hub account is ready
newHire.subject: Welcome to Accrue, {name}
newHire.body1: Welcome to Accrue. We're glad you're here.
newHire.body2: Your Crew Hub account is ready. Crew Hub is where you'll find everything you need: your team, your pay, your time off, and your documents. Think of it as home base.
newHire.body3: To get started, tap the button below to set up your login and authenticator:
newHire.closing: If anything feels off or you have questions, reach out to your manager or the Operations team.

invite.preheader: Set up your login to get started
invite.subject: Your Crew Hub account is ready
invite.body1: We've set up Crew Hub, a new internal platform for the Accrue team. It's where you'll manage your pay, time off, documents, and team info going forward.
invite.body2: Your account is ready. Tap below to set up your login:
invite.closing: Everything you need will be in one place. If you run into any issues getting set up, reach out to the Operations team.

approved.subject: Your time off is approved
approved.body: Your time off request has been approved.
approved.closing: It's on the calendar. Enjoy your time.

rejected.subject: Update on your time off request
rejected.body: Your time off request was not approved.
rejected.closing: If you'd like to discuss or adjust the dates, reach out to {approver} directly.

cancelled.subject: {employeeName} cancelled their time off
cancelled.noAction: No action needed on your end.

payslip.subject: Your payslip for {payPeriod} is ready
payslip.body: Your payslip for {payPeriod} is now available in Crew Hub.
payslip.closing: If anything looks off, reach out to the Operations team.

employee.subject: Your expense was submitted
employee.body: Your expense claim has been submitted and is pending review.
employee.closing: You'll get an update once it's reviewed.

manager.subject: {employeeName} submitted an expense
manager.body: {employeeName} submitted an expense for your review:

employee.subject: Your expense was approved
employee.body: Your expense claim has been approved.

finance.body: An expense has been approved and is ready for finance payment confirmation:
finance.subject: Expense approved, ready for payment confirmation: {description}

rejected.subject: Update on your expense claim
rejected.body: Your expense claim was not approved.
rejected.closing: If you have questions or want to resubmit with changes, reach out to {approver} directly.

disbursed.subject: Your expense has been reimbursed
disbursed.body: Your expense claim has been reimbursed.
disbursed.closing: The payment should reflect in your account shortly.

infoRequested.subject: More info requested for your expense
infoRequested.body: {requesterName} requested more information before approving your expense.

infoResponse.subject: Expense response received
infoResponse.body: {responderName} replied to your request for more info.

signature.subject: Signature request: {requestTitle}
signature.body: {requestedByName} has sent you a document to sign.

paymentDetails.subject: Payment details updated for {employeeName}
paymentDetails.closing: Please review and confirm the update is correct.

reminder.subject: Compliance reminder: {requirement}
reminder.body: This is a reminder about an upcoming compliance deadline.
reminder.closing: Please make sure this is completed on time. If you need help, reach out to the Operations team.

overdue.subject: Compliance overdue: {requirement}
overdue.body: A compliance requirement is now overdue.
overdue.closing: This needs immediate attention. Please follow up directly.

cycleStarted.subject: {cycleName} review has started
cycleStarted.body: The {cycleName} review cycle is now open.

reminder.subject: Reminder: self-review due soon for {cycleName}
reminder.body: Your self-review for {cycleName} is due on {deadline}. Please make sure it's submitted on time.

shared.subject: Your {cycleName} review has been shared
shared.body: Your review for {cycleName} has been shared with you. Take a look when you have a moment.

acknowledged.subject: {employeeName} acknowledged their {cycleName} review
acknowledged.body: {employeeName} has acknowledged their {cycleName} review. No action needed on your end.

expiring.subject: {documentTitle} expires on {expiryDate}
expiring.closing: Please review and take any necessary action before it expires.

employee.subject: {documentTitle} has expired
employee.closing: Please upload a renewed version or take the appropriate next steps.

hr.subject: {documentTitle} has expired
hr.closing: Please upload a renewed version or take the appropriate next steps.

employee.subject: Welcome aboard, {name}
employee.body: Welcome to the team. Your onboarding checklist is ready in Crew Hub. It has everything you need to get started: documents to sign, info to fill in, and tasks to complete.
employee.closing: If you have questions along the way, reach out to your manager or the Operations team.

manager.subject: Onboarding started for {employeeName}
manager.body: {employeeName}'s onboarding has started. Their checklist is live in Crew Hub. You may have tasks assigned to you as part of their setup.

employee.subject: Onboarding task overdue: {taskName}
employee.body: Your onboarding task "{taskName}" is overdue. Please complete it as soon as possible.
employee.closing: If you're stuck or need help, reach out to the Operations team.

hr.subject: Onboarding task overdue: {taskName}
hr.body: The onboarding task "{taskName}" for {employeeName} is overdue and may need follow-up.

employee.subject: Onboarding complete!
employee.body: You've completed your onboarding. Everything is in order. Welcome to the team, for real this time.

manager.subject: {employeeName} completed onboarding
manager.body: {employeeName} has completed all onboarding tasks. No action needed on your end.

published.subject: {scheduleName} schedule published for {month} {year}
published.body: The {scheduleName} schedule for {month} {year} has been published. Check your assigned shifts in Crew Hub.

requested.preheader: {requesterName} wants to swap a shift with you
requested.subject: Shift swap request from {requesterName}
requested.body: {requesterName} has requested to swap a shift with you.

approved.subject: Payroll run approved: {runName}
approved.body: The payroll run "{runName}" has been approved by {approverName} and is ready for processing.

reset.subject: Reset your Crew Hub login
reset.body: A login reset was requested for your Crew Hub account. Tap below to set up a new authenticator:
reset.closing: If you didn't request this, reach out to the Operations team.
